---
title: "BioClockR Phase 3 - Survival Validation Report"
author: "Naresh Gumala"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
df        <- readRDS("C:/Users/Naresh Gumala/Documents/GitHub/BioClockR/data-raw/model_output/survival_data.rds")
cox_model <- readRDS("C:/Users/Naresh Gumala/Documents/GitHub/BioClockR/data-raw/model_output/cox_model.rds")
```

## 1. Study Population

```{r population, echo=FALSE}
df %>%
  group_by(sex) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    deaths = sum(dead),
    death_rate = round(mean(dead) * 100, 1),
    mean_age = round(mean(age), 1),
    mean_bio_age = round(mean(bio_age), 1),
    mean_accel = round(mean(age_accel), 1)
  )
```

## 2. Age Acceleration Distribution in Survival Cohort

```{r accel_dist, echo=FALSE}
ggplot(df, aes(x = age_accel, fill = factor(dead))) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, alpha = 0.7, position = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("steelblue", "red"),
                    labels = c("Alive", "Dead"),
                    name = "Status") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Age Acceleration Distribution by Survival Status",
       x = "Age Acceleration (years)", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 3. Kaplan-Meier Survival Curves

```{r km_plot, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(months, dead) ~ age_accel_group, data = df)
km_plot <- ggsurvplot(
  km_fit, data = df,
  pval = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE,
  palette = c("#E64B35", "#4DBBD5"),
  legend.labs = c("Biologically Older", "Biologically Younger"),
  title = "Survival by Biological Age Acceleration",
  xlab = "Follow-up (Months)",
  ylab = "Survival Probability",
  risk.table = TRUE
)
print(km_plot)
```

## 4. Cox Proportional Hazards Model

```{r cox_results, echo=FALSE}
cox_df <- data.frame(
  Variable = c("Age Acceleration", "Age", "Sex (Male)", "Race: Other Hispanic",
               "Race: NH White", "Race: NH Black", "Race: NH Asian", "Race: Other"),
  HR = round(exp(coef(cox_model)), 3),
  Lower95 = round(exp(confint(cox_model))[,1], 3),
  Upper95 = round(exp(confint(cox_model))[,2], 3),
  Pvalue = round(summary(cox_model)$coefficients[,5], 3)
)
cox_df
```

## 5. Forest Plot of Hazard Ratios

```{r forest_plot, echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
cox_df$Variable <- factor(cox_df$Variable, levels = rev(cox_df$Variable))
ggplot(cox_df, aes(x = HR, y = Variable)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = Lower95, xmax = Upper95), height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Cox Model Hazard Ratios",
       subtitle = "HR > 1 = higher mortality risk",
       x = "Hazard Ratio (95% CI)", y = "") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 6. Key Findings

```{r findings, echo=FALSE}
cat("Concordance index:", round(summary(cox_model)$concordance[1], 3), "
")
cat("Age HR:", round(exp(coef(cox_model)["age"]), 3), "
")
cat("Male HR:", round(exp(coef(cox_model)["sexMale"]), 3), "
")
cat("Age accel HR:", round(exp(coef(cox_model)["age_accel"]), 3), "
")
```
